content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type: This is a pull request review request. The PR is an auto-generated one that regenerates pages, browser app, and other static assets after gene review or template changes.

b. This is specifically a request for code review feedback, not implementation. The user wants me to review the PR and provide feedback on code quality, bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information from the provided data:
- PR has 426,560 additions and 1,391,509 deletions across 100 files
- Major issue already identified: app/data.js is nearly empty (only contains `window.searchData = [];`)
- Previous Claude reviews identified critical issues with browser app data export
- Generated HTML files for gene reviews, project pages updated
- Multiple accessibility and code quality issues noted in previous reviews
- Vote buttons missing aria-labels, console.log statements in production code
- Broken links in project pages

d. Main tasks and challenges:
- Review the auto-generated static assets for quality and correctness
- Assess the critical data.js issue and its impact
- Check for security, performance, and accessibility issues
- Evaluate the overall generation process and outputs
- Provide comprehensive feedback on the identified issues

e. High-level plan:
- Create todo checklist in GitHub comment
- Examine the critical app/data.js issue
- Review key generated HTML files for quality
- Check templates and generation code for issues
- Assess security and performance implications
- Provide comprehensive review feedback via GitHub comment
- Since this is review only, no implementation changes needed

f. No special permissions or setup needed for this review task - just need to read and analyze the files.
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review: Regenerate pages and browser app Reviewing this auto-generated PR that regenerates static assets after gene review changes. #### Review Checklist - [ ] Examine the critical app/data.js issue from previous reviews - [ ] Review key generated HTML files for quality and accessibility - [ ] Check templates for production issues (console.log, accessibility) - [ ] Assess security and performance implications - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback on identified issues --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24268530959)
